# StructUI

> Expanded LLM reference for StructUI. Includes docs links, registry links, machine-readable endpoints, and component summaries.

## Overview

- [Components](https://structui.com/components): Browse the component catalog.
- [Blocks](https://structui.com/blocks): Explore composable blocks and section patterns.
- [Ready to Go](https://structui.com/r2go): Browse starter templates and builder flows.
- [Theme Creator](https://structui.com/theme-creator): Build and export design token themes.
- [CLI Page](https://structui.com/docs/cli): Dedicated CLI docs surface.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/structui/structui): Source code, issues, and project history.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://structui.com/docs/introduction): What StructUI is and how the registry-first model works.
- [Installation](https://structui.com/docs/installation): Add struct-ui and configure the base setup.
- [Registry & LLMs](https://structui.com/docs/registry): Public machine-readable endpoints and LLM discovery surfaces.
- [Theming](https://structui.com/docs/theming): CSS variable driven theming and token customization.
- [CLI Usage](https://structui.com/docs/cli): Canonical strui command surface and examples.
- [Design Principles](https://structui.com/docs/principles): System principles behind composition, consistency, and scale.
- [Styling System](https://structui.com/docs/styling): Tailwind and token-level styling approach.
- [Accessibility](https://structui.com/docs/accessibility): Accessibility guarantees and expectations.

## Package

- package: `struct-ui`
- cli: `npx strui`
- metrics: 56 total, 3 markdown-documented, 56 stable, 8 categories

## Registry Surfaces

- [registry.json](https://structui.com/registry.json): Global registry export with metrics and component index.
- [registry/index.json](https://structui.com/registry/index.json): Mirrored registry index export.
- [Component JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/button.json): Example per-component structured record.
- [Component Markdown](https://structui.com/registry/components/button.md): Example component markdown document when available.
- [llms.txt](https://structui.com/llms.txt): Compact discovery-oriented LLM file.
- [llms-full.txt](https://structui.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded LLM reference with grouped component links.

## Components (56)

### Advanced Patterns

- [3D Pin](https://structui.com/components/3d-pin): 3D Pin: Interactive 3D hover card for standout links and showcases.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/3d-pin) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/3d-pin.json)
- [Command Palette](https://structui.com/components/command-palette): Command Palette: Keyboard-driven search and action launcher.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/command-palette) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/command-palette.json)
- [Hero](https://structui.com/components/hero): Hero: Landing page hero section for high-impact product messaging.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/hero) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/hero.json)

### Core

- [Badge](https://structui.com/components/badge): Use Badge to communicate status, category, or small metadata labels. Suitable for filters, labels, and inline semantic emphasis.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/badge) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/badge.json) | [Registry Markdown](https://structui.com/registry/components/badge.md)
  - tags: status, label, metadata, pill
  - related: button
- [Button](https://structui.com/components/button): Use Button for primary and secondary actions. Supports variants, sizes, icons, loading states, and polymorphic rendering via asChild.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/button) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/button.json) | [Registry Markdown](https://structui.com/registry/components/button.md)
  - tags: action, trigger, form, cta
  - related: badge, accordion
- [Loaders & Spinners](https://structui.com/components/loaders): Loaders & Spinners: Animated loading indicators for async states and pending screens.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/loaders) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/loaders.json)
  - tags: loading, spinner, feedback
- [Typography](https://structui.com/components/typography): Typography: Type styles and content patterns for structured text layouts.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/typography) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/typography.json)
  - tags: text, content, heading

### Data Views

- [Accordion](https://structui.com/components/accordion): Use Accordion for FAQs, settings panels, and dense content sections. Supports single or multiple expanded items and keyboard navigation.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/accordion) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/accordion.json) | [Registry Markdown](https://structui.com/registry/components/accordion.md)
  - tags: collapse, faq, disclosure, content
  - related: button
- [Avatar](https://structui.com/components/avatar): Avatar: Profile image primitive with fallback states.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/avatar) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/avatar.json)
- [Calendar](https://structui.com/components/calendar): Calendar: Date and schedule UI for picking and browsing dates.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/calendar) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/calendar.json)
- [Charts](https://structui.com/components/charts): Charts: Composable chart components for visualizing trends and distributions.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/charts) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/charts.json)
- [Data Table Advanced](https://structui.com/components/data-table-advanced): Data Table Advanced: Feature-rich table with sorting, filtering, and large dataset support.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/data-table-advanced) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/data-table-advanced.json)
- [Kanban](https://structui.com/components/kanban): Kanban: Board-style workflow layout for task and pipeline management.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/kanban) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/kanban.json)
- [Pricing](https://structui.com/components/pricing): Pricing: Pricing cards and plan comparison layouts.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/pricing) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/pricing.json)
- [Skeleton](https://structui.com/components/skeleton): Skeleton: Loading placeholder blocks for content still in flight.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/skeleton) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/skeleton.json)
- [Stats](https://structui.com/components/stats): Stats: Metric cards and summary layouts for dashboards.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/stats) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/stats.json)
- [Table](https://structui.com/components/table): Table: Standard table primitives for structured data.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/table) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/table.json)
- [Timeline](https://structui.com/components/timeline): Timeline: Sequential activity and event display for history-heavy screens.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/timeline) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/timeline.json)

### Feedback & Status

- [Alert](https://structui.com/components/alert): Alert: Inline status and warning messaging.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/alert) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/alert.json)
- [Progress](https://structui.com/components/progress): Progress: Progress indicators for uploads, steps, and async work.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/progress) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/progress.json)
- [Spinner](https://structui.com/components/spinner): Spinner: Compact loading spinner for buttons and small placeholders.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/spinner) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/spinner.json)
- [Toast](https://structui.com/components/toast): Toast: Transient notification system for success, error, and info messages.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/toast) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/toast.json)

### Inputs & Forms

- [Checkbox](https://structui.com/components/checkbox): Checkbox: Binary input for multi-select and consent flows.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/checkbox) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/checkbox.json)
- [Combobox](https://structui.com/components/combobox): Combobox: Searchable selection UI for larger option sets.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/combobox) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/combobox.json)
- [File Upload](https://structui.com/components/file-upload): File Upload: Drag-and-drop upload field for files and attachments.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/file-upload) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/file-upload.json)
- [Input](https://structui.com/components/input): Input: Standard text input field for forms and filters.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/input) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/input.json)
- [Input OTP](https://structui.com/components/input-otp): Input OTP: Segmented one-time password input for auth flows.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/input-otp) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/input-otp.json)
- [Input Tag](https://structui.com/components/input-tag): Input Tag: Tag entry input for labels, recipients, and multi-value fields.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/input-tag) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/input-tag.json)
- [Markdown Editor](https://structui.com/components/markdown-editor): Markdown Editor: Markdown editor with live preview for content workflows.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/markdown-editor) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/markdown-editor.json)
- [Radio Group](https://structui.com/components/radio-group): Radio Group: Single-selection input for mutually exclusive choices.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/radio-group) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/radio-group.json)
- [Select](https://structui.com/components/select): Select: Dropdown selection menu for predefined options.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/select) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/select.json)
- [Slider](https://structui.com/components/slider): Slider: Range input for numeric selection and tuning.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/slider) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/slider.json)
- [Switch](https://structui.com/components/switch): Switch: Toggle control for on/off settings.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/switch) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/switch.json)
- [Textarea](https://structui.com/components/textarea): Textarea: Multiline text field for messages, notes, and descriptions.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/textarea) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/textarea.json)
- [Toggle](https://structui.com/components/toggle): Toggle: Pressed-state control for compact option toggles.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/toggle) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/toggle.json)

### Layout & Structure

- [Aspect Ratio](https://structui.com/components/aspect-ratio): Aspect Ratio: Constrain media and embeds to a fixed aspect ratio.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/aspect-ratio) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/aspect-ratio.json)
- [Bento Grid](https://structui.com/components/bento-grid): Bento Grid: Editorial grid layout for feature sections and dashboards.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/bento-grid) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/bento-grid.json)
- [Card](https://structui.com/components/card): Card: Flexible container for grouped content, metadata, and actions.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/card) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/card.json)
  - related: badge, button
- [Device Mockups](https://structui.com/components/device-mockups): Device Mockups: Device frames for product previews across desktop and mobile form factors.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/device-mockups) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/device-mockups.json)
- [Scroll Area](https://structui.com/components/scroll-area): Scroll Area: Styled scroll container for overflow-heavy content.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/scroll-area) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/scroll-area.json)
- [Separator](https://structui.com/components/separator): Separator: Visual divider for grouping content and actions.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/separator) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/separator.json)

### Navigation

- [Breadcrumbs](https://structui.com/components/breadcrumbs): Breadcrumbs: Hierarchy-based navigation trail for nested pages.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/breadcrumbs) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/breadcrumbs.json)
- [Menubar](https://structui.com/components/menubar): Menubar: Desktop-style application menu bar.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/menubar) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/menubar.json)
- [Navigation Menu](https://structui.com/components/navigation-menu): Navigation Menu: Advanced site navigation menus for headers and mega menus.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/navigation-menu) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/navigation-menu.json)
- [Pagination](https://structui.com/components/pagination): Pagination: Paging controls for list and table navigation.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/pagination) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/pagination.json)
- [Stepper](https://structui.com/components/stepper): Stepper: Step-based progress indicator for multi-stage flows.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/stepper) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/stepper.json)
- [Tabs](https://structui.com/components/tabs): Tabs: Tabbed navigation for switching between related content panels.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/tabs) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/tabs.json)

### Overlays

- [Alert Dialog](https://structui.com/components/alert-dialog): Alert Dialog: High-stakes confirmation dialog for destructive actions.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/alert-dialog) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/alert-dialog.json)
- [Context Menu](https://structui.com/components/context-menu): Context Menu: Right-click menu for contextual actions.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/context-menu) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/context-menu.json)
- [Cookies Banner](https://structui.com/components/cookies-banner): Cookies Banner: Consent banner for privacy and cookie preferences.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/cookies-banner) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/cookies-banner.json)
- [Dialogs](https://structui.com/components/dialogs): Dialogs: Modal flows for auth, confirmation, and focused interaction.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/dialogs) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/dialogs.json)
- [Dropdown Menu](https://structui.com/components/dropdown-menu): Dropdown Menu: Action menu for compact contextual choices.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/dropdown-menu) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/dropdown-menu.json)
- [Hover Card](https://structui.com/components/hover-card): Hover Card: Preview card shown on hover for linked entities and metadata.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/hover-card) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/hover-card.json)
- [Popover](https://structui.com/components/popover): Popover: Floating panel anchored to a trigger element.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/popover) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/popover.json)
- [Sheet](https://structui.com/components/sheet): Sheet: Slide-over panel for secondary flows and contextual tasks.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/sheet) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/sheet.json)
- [Tooltip](https://structui.com/components/tooltip): Tooltip: Short contextual hint shown on hover or focus.
  - links: [Docs](https://structui.com/components/tooltip) | [Registry JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/tooltip.json)
